name: claude-review
description: Run Claude Opus 4.6 and long-context Sonnet review passes from inside Codex CLI sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Review Codex changes with Claude quality and adversarial challenge passes
interface.longDescription: Use Claude Review to run high-scrutiny code review, adversarial design review, setup checks, and background review jobs from inside Codex CLI sessions using the local Claude CLI runtime.
defaultPrompt: Review the current Codex-generated changes with Claude and flag anything unsafe, brittle, or under-tested.
Run an adversarial review on the current diff and challenge the design.
Check whether the current workspace is ready for a Claude review run.
